The powder-coated motor resists water and chemicals, while the reinforced plastic housing components resist chlorine. The components of the case are made of reinforced chlorine resistant plastic. The CF GROUP Aqua Plus 4 filter pump is self-priming. It is installed a maximum of 2 m above the water level and 3 m below the water level.
